properties.description: Azure Data Factory pipeline for Customer 360 aggregation

activities.name: Extract_Customer_Data
activities.sqlQuery: SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.phone, c.signup_date, c.lifetime_value FROM crm.customers c WHERE c.is_active = 1

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT t.transaction_id, t.customer_id, t.transaction_date, t.amount, t.product_id, t.channel FROM crm.transactions t JOIN crm.customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE t.transaction_date >= '2024-01-01'

sink.sqlWriterStoredProcedure: INSERT INTO gold.customer_transactions SELECT transaction_id, customer_id, transaction_date, amount, product_id, channel FROM staging.customer_transactions_stage

activities.name: Aggregate_Customer_360
activities.sqlQuery: INSERT INTO gold.customer_360_summary SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date, COUNT(t.transaction_id) AS total_transactions, SUM(t.amount) AS total_spend, MAX(t.transaction_date) AS last_transaction_date FROM gold.customer_transactions t JOIN crm.customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.email, c.signup_date
